sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86519" key="proanakinhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-κῑνητέον</orth>, <sense id="n86519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must exercise</tr_> <pb n="1468" TEIform="pb"/> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">before,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἑαυτούς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathin.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:7:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.7.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
